title: Knockback/Push Event Handlers Analysis
summary: Analysis of displacement, knockback, and push mechanics in the Menace tactical game. No explicit 'Knockback' functions were found - the game uses visual 'Shove/Shake' effects for hit reactions and 'Charge' handlers for actual position displacement.

handlers.name: ShoveEffect
handlers.purpose: Visual knockback animation on unit hit - does NOT change tile position

fields.description: Active flag - true while effect is playing

Start.description: Capture initial position and begin animation

Update.description: Lerp position during animation, return 0 when complete

handlers.name: ShakeEffect
handlers.purpose: Two-phase hit reaction effect with color tint - used for damage visual feedback

handlers.name: ChargeHandler
handlers.purpose: Actual position displacement - moves USER to tile adjacent to target for melee attack

OnUse.description: Execute charge - MoveToWithSkill with flag 5, apply skill on arrival if flag 8 set

OnVerifyTarget.description: Validate charge path - enemy on tile, clear path, line of sight, valid terrain

OnTileChanged.description: Apply skill to any enemy encountered during charge movement

key_behaviors.description: Uses MoveToWithSkill to physically move the charging unit to the tile past the target

handlers.name: ChargeInfantryHandler
handlers.purpose: Infantry-specific charge attack with similar displacement mechanics

OnUse.description: Execute infantry charge - similar to ChargeHandler

OnDetermineFinalUserTile.description: Predict where charging unit ends up (tile past target)

handlers.name: JetPackHandler
handlers.purpose: Aerial displacement - moves unit via flight arc to target tile

OnVerifyTarget.description: Validate landing tile - empty, no hazards

handlers.name: JumpIntoMeleeHandler
handlers.purpose: Melee attack that jumps to target and kills it (likely for creatures/large units)

OnApply.description: Calculate direction, check target actor, call KillAttackingElement

KillAttackingElement.description: Execute the kill with direction-based death effect

core_movement_functions.name: Element.MoveTo
core_movement_functions.description: Core movement function for all tactical elements

key_offsets.0x38: Movement template (contains path processor settings at 0x2b0)

core_movement_functions.name: Actor.MoveToWithSkill
core_movement_functions.description: Wrapper that associates a skill with movement (used by charge attacks)

core_movement_functions.name: Element.PullTowardsTileCenter
core_movement_functions.description: Applies centering force based on movement template's pull factor

key_offsets.movementTemplate.700: Pull factor (0.0 = no pull, 1.0 = full center)

key_discoveries.detail: The game does not have enemy-displacing knockback mechanics. 'Knockback' is purely visual via ShoveEffect/ShakeEffect.

key_discoveries.finding: Charge attacks are the only true displacement
key_discoveries.detail: ChargeHandler and ChargeInfantryHandler move the ATTACKER, not the target. Target remains on their tile.
Uses coroutine state machine with animation curves for smooth flight arc. Handles fog of war visibility during flight.
Flag 5 indicates skill-based charge movement. Flag 8 triggers skill application on arrival.
Two-phase animation (forward+return) with color tinting. Position returns to origin - no tile change.
Element.OnHit at 0x1805fd880 triggers ShakeEffect based on damage threshold from EntityTemplate offset 0x238.

related_systems.TacticalManager: Central manager accessed via TypeInfo+0xb8 static field
